name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships for College & University Students
benefits_summary: Annual scholarship for UG students based on Class 12 merit
documentation_required: Aadhaar, bank passbook, Class 12 mark sheet, income certificate
notes: Map to course type and board

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMS)
academic_requirement: Qualify NMMS test; min % in previous class
benefits_summary: Annual stipend to meritorious class 9–12 students of govt/aided schools
documentation_required: Income certificate, previous marks, school certificate
notes: Keep track of renewal each year

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls (Technical)
academic_requirement: Admission in AICTE-approved first-year technical program

documentation_required: Admission proof, AICTE approval, income certificate

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship for Students with Disability (Technical)
academic_requirement: Admission in AICTE-approved first-year technical program
benefits_summary: Annual support + contingency for PwD students in technical courses
documentation_required: Disability certificate, admission proof, income certificate

name: Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students
